theme.rationale: Food and kitchen management software heavily benefits from clean, bright environments to denote hygiene, clarity, and precision. A dark mode toggle should exist for night-shift operations or B2B client portal preferences.

headings.usage: Use bold weights (800) with tight tracking (`tracking-tight`) for page titles and metrics. Use light weights (300) for large informational numbers.

body.usage: For all tables, descriptions, form labels, and smaller UI text. High legibility for dense data.

mono.usage: Use strictly for order IDs, SKU numbers, monetary values, and inventory codes to ensure tabular alignment.

colors.archetype: ORGANIC & EARTHY mixed with SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST

background.description: Warm bone white for light mode to reduce glare, pure obsidian for dark mode.

surface.description: Main card and panel backgrounds. Must use a sharp 1px border instead of drop shadows.

border.description: Subtle borders. The grid lines must be visible.

primary.description: Burnt Orange / Terracotta. Appetizing and high-energy. Used for primary CTAs and alerts.

secondary.description: Deep Sage Green. Used for success states, inventory health, and positive financial metrics.

warning.description: Ochre/Mustard. Used for low stock or pending states.

rules: No default SaaS Blue. Rely heavily on grayscale with sharp pops of Terracotta (#E04D30) and Sage (#2E6A4F).
Hover states for primary buttons must be a lighter hue: hover:bg-[#F26348] hover:text-white.
Do NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for headers/dropdowns. Use bg-white/80 with backdrop-blur-xl.
Avoid floating, heavily shadowed cards. Use sharp, cardless layouts with 1px border (`border border-border`) and no shadow.
Use `h-full` on children to ensure they stretch to match neighbors. No jagged bottoms.
Use generous inner padding (`p-6` or `p-8`) for widget containers to prevent text collision.

surfaces: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Use `border-collapse` style for data-heavy sections.
Neumorphism (Tactile Variant): For toggles and small action buttons, use sharp 1px borders combined with subtle inner shadows.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal to none. Rely on 1px borders (`border-gray-200`) for definition. If shadow is necessary, use `shadow-sm` only.

motion.hover: All interactive elements must have hover states. E.g., `-translate-y-[2px] shadow-sm`.
motion.transitions: Use specific properties: `transition-transform duration-200 ease-out, transition-colors duration-200 ease-out`. DO NOT use `transition-all`.
motion.charts: Animate chart mounting with a staggered Y-axis slide-in.

component_rules.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (`rounded-md`). Do NOT use square buttons. Must include `data-testid`.
component_rules.tables: Dense rows (`py-2`). Left-align text, right-align monetary/number values. Use `font-mono` for IDs.
component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Input backgrounds should be a very light gray (`bg-gray-50`) with a darker border on focus (`focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary`).
component_rules.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Customize colors to match the Earthy palette (Terracotta, Sage, Ochre, Charcoal).
component_rules.cards: Avoid Shadcn default Card if it looks too generic. Override with `border border-gray-200 shadow-none rounded-xl bg-white`.

images.rules: Mobile height max `80vh`. Use object-cover for backgrounds.

icons.usage: Use 'Duotone' weight for marketing/landing pages, and 'Regular' or 'Bold' weight for dense dashboards. NEVER use emojis as icons.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use Recharts for all standard financial and inventory data (Food Cost Calculator, Sales Projections). No heavy 3D required for dashboard to ensure snappy performance.
3d_libraries.exceptions: If a landing page is built, consider a lightweight Spline scene of a floating clipboard/tablet, otherwise stick to 2D for B2B efficiency.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over Terracotta or Sage backgrounds meets APCA 3:1 contrast minimums. Use white text over #E04D30.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
accessibility.focus: Focus states must have HIGHER contrast, not lower. E.g., `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this file and apply the colors, typography, and grids precisely.
Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react sonner recharts` before building components.
DO NOT use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical or dense grid bento layouts.
Set up Tailwind config with the specified colors (primary: #E04D30, secondary: #2E6A4F) and fonts (Chivo, Figtree).
Implement a multi-role structure (Admin, Chef, B2B) using conditional rendering and separate layout wrappers.
For the Analytics Dashboard, ensure charts (Recharts) use the Earthy palette, not default bright neon colors.
DO NOT use `text-align: center` on the main App wrapper.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky navs.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
